sqlMap.sql:
WHERE f.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND f.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
t.TYPE_NAME = 'document'
t.TYPE_NAME = 'music'
t.TYPE_NAME = 'video'
t.TYPE_NAME = 'image'
t.TYPE_NAME = 'zip'
t.TYPE_NAME is null
f.FILE_EXT LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #fileExt#), '%')
f.FILE_NAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #fileName#), '%')
f.CREATE_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #userName#), '%')
f.CREATE_NAME2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #userName#), '%')
(f.CREATE_DATE >= #startDate# AND f.CREATE_DATE <= #endDate#)

SELECT FILE_ID AS fileId, FILE_NAME AS fileName, FILE_PATH AS filePath, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modifiedDate, UPDATE_NAME AS modifiedAuthorName, UPDATE_NAME2 AS modifiedAuthorName2, FILE_SIZE AS fileSize, VERSION FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE_HISTORY WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE_HISTORY WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE ( FILE_NAME, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, TYPE_ID, DOWN_COUNT, FILE_EXT, FOLDER_ID, USE_STATUS, CREATE_ID, CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2, CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_ID, UPDATE_DATE, DELETER_ID, TENANT_ID, DEPTH, ROOT_ID, PARENT_ID, HIERARCHICAL_PATH ) VALUES ( #fileName#, #filePath#, #fileSize#, #typeId#, #downloadCnt#, #fileExt#, #folderId#, #useStatus#, #createId#, #createName1#, #createName2#, #createDate#, #updateId#, #updateDate#, #deleterId#, #tenantId#, #depth#, #rootId#, #parentId#, #hierarchicalPath# )
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() as newFolderId FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE LIMIT 1
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE SET FILE_NAME = #fileName#, FILE_PATH = #filePath#, FILE_SIZE = #fileSize#, TYPE_ID = #typeId#, DOWN_COUNT = #downloadCnt#, FILE_EXT = #fileExt#, FOLDER_ID = #folderId#, USE_STATUS = #useStatus#, CREATE_ID = #createId#, CREATE_NAME1 = #createName1#, CREATE_NAME2 = #createName2#, CREATE_DATE = #createDate#, UPDATE_ID = #updateId#, UPDATE_DATE = #updateDate#, DELETER_ID = #deleterId# WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE SET ROOT_ID = #rootId#, PARENT_ID = #parentId#, HIERARCHICAL_PATH = #hierarchicalPath# WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILEUSER (FILE_ID, USER_ID, USER_TYPE, CREATE_ID, CREATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, SUBDEPT_PERMITTED) VALUES (#fileId#, #userId#, #userType#, #createId#, #createDate#, #comId#, #tenantId#, 0)
sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CONVERT(FILE_ID, UNSIGNED INTEGER)), -1) as maxno FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) as maxno FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CONVERT(FOLDER_ID, UNSIGNED INTEGER)),-1) as maxno FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CONVERT(SEQ_ID, UNSIGNED INTEGER)),-1) as maxno FROM
TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER
TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILEUSER
WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(FOLDER_STEP),-1) as maxno FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_UPPER = #folderId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME1, FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDER_NAME2, FOLDER_TYPE AS FOLDER_TYPE, FOLDER_PATH AS FOLDER_PATH, FOLDER_STEP AS FOLDER_STEP, FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDER_LEVEL, FOLDER_UPPER AS FOLDER_UPPER, USE_STATUS AS USE_STATUS, OWNER_ID AS OWNER_ID, CREATE_ID AS CREATE_ID, DATE_ADD(CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2 AS CREATE_NAME2, UPDATE_ID AS UPDATE_ID, DATE_ADD(UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID AS COMPANY_ID, DELETER_ID AS DELETER_ID, TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE OWNER_ID = #companyId# AND FOLDER_TYPE = #type# AND FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CONVERT(LOG_ID, UNSIGNED INTEGER)),-1) as maxno FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_LOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT * FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE WHERE FILE_EXT = #extension# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT f.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID, f.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME, f.FILE_PATH AS FILE_PATH, f.FILE_SIZE AS FILE_SIZE, f.TYPE_ID AS TYPE_ID, f.DOWN_COUNT AS DOWN_COUNT, f.FILE_EXT AS FILE_EXT, f.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, f.USE_STATUS AS USE_STATUS, f.CREATE_ID AS CREATE_ID, f.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, f.CREATE_NAME2 AS CREATE_NAME2, DATE_ADD(f.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_ID AS UPDATE_ID, DATE_ADD(f.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATE_DATE, t.TYPE_ID AS FILETYPE_ID, CASE WHEN t.TYPE_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN t.TYPE_NAME ELSE (SELECT TYPE_NAME FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE WHERE FILE_EXT = 'unknown' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) END AS FILETYPE_NAME, CASE WHEN t.TYPE_ICON IS NOT NULL THEN t.TYPE_ICON ELSE (SELECT TYPE_ICON FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE WHERE FILE_EXT = 'unknown' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) END AS FILETYPE_ICON, f.DELETER_ID AS DELETER_ID, f.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, f.DEPTH, f.ROOT_ID, f.PARENT_ID, f.HIERARCHICAL_PATH, f.VERSION FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE f LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE t ON f.FILE_EXT = t.FILE_EXT AND f.TENANT_ID = t.TENANT_ID WHERE f.FILE_ID = #fileId# AND f.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT OLD.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FILENAME, 'FILE' AS NEWTYPE, '' AS NEWID, '' AS NEWDATE, '' AS NEWSIZE, 'DIRECTORY' AS OLDTYPE, OLD.FOLDER_ID AS OLDID, DATE_ADD(OLD.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS OLDDATE, '-' AS OLDSIZE, OLD.CREATE_ID as OLDOWNERID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER OLD WHERE OLD.FOLDER_NAME1 = #fileName# AND OLD.FOLDER_UPPER = #targetFolderId# AND OLD.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND OLD.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
UNION
SELECT OLD.FILE_NAME AS FILENAME, 'FILE' AS NEWTYPE, '' AS NEWID, '' AS NEWDATE, '' AS NEWSIZE, 'FILE' AS OLDTYPE, OLD.FILE_ID AS OLDID, DATE_ADD(OLD.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS OLDDATE, OLD.FILE_SIZE AS OLDSIZE, OLD.CREATE_ID as OLDOWNERID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE OLD WHERE OLD.FILE_NAME = #fileName# AND OLD.FOLDER_ID = #targetFolderId# AND OLD.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND OLD.USE_STATUS = 'Y'

SELECT NEW.FILE_NAME AS FILENAME, 'FILE' AS NEWTYPE, NEW.FILE_ID AS NEWID, DATE_ADD(NEW.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS NEWDATE, NEW.FILE_SIZE AS NEWSIZE, 'DIRECTORY' AS OLDTYPE, OLD.FOLDER_ID AS OLDID, DATE_ADD(OLD.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS OLDDATE, '-' AS OLDSIZE, OLD.CREATE_ID as OLDOWNERID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE NEW INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER OLD ON
OLD.FOLDER_NAME1 = #newName#
NEW.FILE_NAME = OLD.FOLDER_NAME1
AND OLD.FOLDER_UPPER = #targetFolderId# AND NEW.TENANT_ID = OLD.TENANT_ID AND OLD.USE_STATUS = 'Y' WHERE NEW.FILE_ID = #originElementId# AND NEW.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UNION
SELECT NEW.FILE_NAME AS FILENAME, 'FILE' AS NEWTYPE, NEW.FILE_ID AS NEWID, DATE_ADD(NEW.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS NEWDATE, NEW.FILE_SIZE AS NEWSIZE, 'FILE' AS OLDTYPE, OLD.FILE_ID AS OLDID, DATE_ADD(OLD.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS OLDDATE, OLD.FILE_SIZE AS OLDSIZE, OLD.CREATE_ID as OLDOWNERID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE NEW INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE OLD ON
OLD.FILE_NAME = #newName#
NEW.FILE_NAME = OLD.FILE_NAME
AND OLD.FOLDER_ID = #targetFolderId# AND NEW.TENANT_ID = OLD.TENANT_ID AND OLD.USE_STATUS = 'Y' WHERE NEW.FILE_ID = #originElementId# AND NEW.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT NEW.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FILENAME, 'DIRECTORY' AS NEWTYPE, NEW.FOLDER_ID AS NEWID, DATE_ADD(NEW.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS NEWDATE, '-' AS NEWSIZE, 'DIRECTORY' AS OLDTYPE, OLD.FOLDER_ID AS OLDID, DATE_ADD(OLD.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS OLDDATE, '-' AS OLDSIZE, OLD.CREATE_ID as OLDOWNERID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER NEW INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER OLD ON
OLD.FOLDER_NAME1 = #newName#
NEW.FOLDER_NAME1 = OLD.FOLDER_NAME1
AND OLD.FOLDER_UPPER = #targetFolderId# AND NEW.TENANT_ID = OLD.TENANT_ID AND OLD.USE_STATUS = 'Y' WHERE NEW.FOLDER_ID = #originElementId# AND NEW.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UNION
SELECT NEW.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FILENAME, 'DIRECTORY' AS NEWTYPE, NEW.FOLDER_ID AS NEWID, DATE_ADD(NEW.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS NEWDATE, '-' AS NEWSIZE, 'FILE' AS OLDTYPE, OLD.FILE_ID AS OLDID, DATE_ADD(OLD.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS OLDDATE, OLD.FILE_SIZE AS OLDSIZE, OLD.CREATE_ID as OLDOWNERID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER NEW INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE OLD ON
OLD.FILE_NAME = #newName#
NEW.FOLDER_NAME1 = OLD.FILE_NAME
AND OLD.FOLDER_ID = #targetFolderId# AND NEW.TENANT_ID = OLD.TENANT_ID AND OLD.USE_STATUS = 'Y' WHERE NEW.FOLDER_ID = #originElementId# AND NEW.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT f.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID, f.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME, f.FILE_PATH AS FILE_PATH, f.FILE_SIZE AS FILE_SIZE, f.TYPE_ID AS TYPE_ID, f.DOWN_COUNT AS DOWN_COUNT, f.FILE_EXT AS FILE_EXT, f.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, f.USE_STATUS AS USE_STATUS, f.CREATE_ID AS CREATE_ID, f.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, f.CREATE_NAME2 AS CREATE_NAME2, DATE_ADD(f.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_ID AS UPDATE_ID, DATE_ADD(f.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATE_DATE, t.TYPE_ID AS FILETYPE_ID, CASE WHEN t.TYPE_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN t.TYPE_NAME ELSE (SELECT TYPE_NAME FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE WHERE FILE_EXT = 'unknown' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) END AS FILETYPE_NAME, CASE WHEN t.TYPE_ICON IS NOT NULL THEN t.TYPE_ICON ELSE (SELECT TYPE_ICON FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE WHERE FILE_EXT = 'unknown' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) END AS FILETYPE_ICON, CONCAT(#originalPath#, f.FILE_NAME) AS FILE_POSITION, '' AS FOLDER_NAME, '' AS FOLDER_PATH, f.DELETER_ID AS DELETER_ID, f.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, NVL2(ENC.FILE_ID, 1, 0) as ENCRYPTED, f.DEPTH, f.ROOT_ID, f.PARENT_ID, f.HIERARCHICAL_PATH FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE f LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE t ON f.FILE_EXT = t.FILE_EXT AND f.TENANT_ID = t.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_ENCRYPTED_FILE ENC ON ENC.FILE_ID = f.FILE_ID AND ENC.VERSION = f.VERSION AND ENC.TENANT_ID = f.TENANT_ID
AND f.FOLDER_ID = #folderId# ORDER BY
$orderByData$,
$realColmn$ $order$, f.ROOT_ID DESC, f.HIERARCHICAL_PATH
f.ROOT_ID DESC, f.HIERARCHICAL_PATH
LIMIT #startPoint#, #pageSize#

SELECT f.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID, f.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME, f.FILE_PATH AS FILE_PATH, f.FILE_SIZE AS FILE_SIZE, f.TYPE_ID AS TYPE_ID, f.DOWN_COUNT AS DOWN_COUNT, f.FILE_EXT AS FILE_EXT, f.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, f.USE_STATUS AS USE_STATUS, f.CREATE_ID AS CREATE_ID, f.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, f.CREATE_NAME2 AS CREATE_NAME2, DATE_ADD(f.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, f.UPDATE_ID AS UPDATE_ID, DATE_ADD(f.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATE_DATE, t.TYPE_ID AS FILETYPE_ID, CASE WHEN t.TYPE_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN t.TYPE_NAME ELSE (SELECT TYPE_NAME FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE WHERE FILE_EXT = 'unknown' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) END AS FILETYPE_NAME, CASE WHEN t.TYPE_ICON IS NOT NULL THEN t.TYPE_ICON ELSE (SELECT TYPE_ICON FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE WHERE FILE_EXT = 'unknown' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) END AS FILETYPE_ICON, ( CASE WHEN u.FOLDER_LEVEL = 0 THEN CONCAT(#originalPath#, f.FILE_NAME) WHEN u.FOLDER_LEVEL = 1 THEN CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(#originalPath#, IF(#primary# = '1', u.FOLDER_NAME1, u.FOLDER_NAME2)), "/"), f.FILE_NAME) ELSE '' END ) AS FILE_POSITION, '' AS FOLDER_NAME, u.FOLDER_PATH AS FOLDER_PATH, f.DELETER_ID AS DELETER_ID, f.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, NVL2(ENC.FILE_ID, 1, 0) as ENCRYPTED, f.DEPTH, f.ROOT_ID, f.PARENT_ID, f.HIERARCHICAL_PATH FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE f LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE t ON f.FILE_EXT = t.FILE_EXT AND f.TENANT_ID = t.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER u ON f.TENANT_ID = u.TENANT_ID AND f.FOLDER_ID = u.FOLDER_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_ENCRYPTED_FILE ENC ON ENC.FILE_ID = f.FILE_ID AND ENC.VERSION = f.VERSION AND ENC.TENANT_ID = f.TENANT_ID
AND u.FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#folderPath#, '%') ORDER BY $orderByData$,
$realColmn$ $order$, f.ROOT_ID DESC, f.HIERARCHICAL_PATH
f.ROOT_ID DESC, f.HIERARCHICAL_PATH
LIMIT #startPoint#, #pageSize#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE f LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE t ON f.FILE_EXT = t.FILE_EXT AND f.TENANT_ID = t.TENANT_ID
AND f.FOLDER_ID = #folderId#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE f LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE t ON f.FILE_EXT = t.FILE_EXT AND f.TENANT_ID = t.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER u ON f.TENANT_ID = u.TENANT_ID AND f.FOLDER_ID = u.FOLDER_ID
AND u.FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#folderPath#, '%')

SELECT FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME1, FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDER_NAME2, FOLDER_TYPE AS FOLDER_TYPE, FOLDER_PATH AS FOLDER_PATH, FOLDER_STEP AS FOLDER_STEP, FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDER_LEVEL, FOLDER_UPPER AS FOLDER_UPPER, USE_STATUS AS USE_STATUS, OWNER_ID AS OWNER_ID, CREATE_ID AS CREATE_ID, DATE_ADD(CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2 AS CREATE_NAME2, UPDATE_ID AS UPDATE_ID, DATE_ADD(UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID AS COMPANY_ID, DELETER_ID AS DELETER_ID, TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT a.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, a.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME, a.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDER_NAME2, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER b WHERE b.FOLDER_UPPER = a.FOLDER_ID AND b.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND b.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS HAS_SUB, a.FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDER_LEVEL, a.OWNER_ID AS OWNER_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER a WHERE a.FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND a.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT USER_ID, CASE WHEN LOWER(USER_TYPE) = "user" THEN a.DISPLAYNAME WHEN LOWER(USER_TYPE) = "dept" THEN d.DISPLAYNAME WHEN LOWER(USER_TYPE) = "jikwi" THEN jw.displayname WHEN LOWER(USER_TYPE) = "jikchek" THEN jc.displayname WHEN LOWER(USER_TYPE) = "group" THEN g.group_name else '' END AS DISPLAY_NAME1, CASE WHEN LOWER(USER_TYPE) = "user" THEN a.DISPLAYNAME2 WHEN LOWER(USER_TYPE) = "dept" THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 WHEN LOWER(USER_TYPE) = "jikwi" THEN jw.displayname2 WHEN LOWER(USER_TYPE) = "jikchek" THEN jc.displayname2 WHEN LOWER(USER_TYPE) = "group" THEN g.group_name else '' END AS DISPLAY_NAME2, USER_TYPE, SUBDEPT_PERMITTED, FOLDER_MANAGER, CASE WHEN LOWER(USER_TYPE) = 'user' THEN a.DESCRIPTION END AS DISPLAY_DEPT_NAME1, CASE WHEN LOWER(USER_TYPE) = 'user' THEN a.DESCRIPTION2 END AS DISPLAY_DEPT_NAME2 FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER u LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER a ON u.USER_ID = a.CN and u.TENANT_ID = a.TENANT_ID and LOWER(u.USER_TYPE) = 'user' LEFT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER d ON u.USER_ID = d.CN and u.TENANT_ID = d.TENANT_ID and LOWER(u.USER_TYPE) = 'dept' LEFT JOIN TBL_USER_JOBMASTER jw ON u.USER_ID = jw.JOBID and u.TENANT_ID = jw.TENANT_ID and u.COMPANY_ID = jw.COMPANYID and LOWER(u.USER_TYPE) = 'jikwi' and jw.TYPE = '001' LEFT JOIN TBL_USER_JOBMASTER jc ON u.USER_ID = jc.JOBID and u.TENANT_ID = jc.TENANT_ID and u.COMPANY_ID = jc.COMPANYID and LOWER(u.USER_TYPE) = 'jikchek' and jc.TYPE = '002' LEFT JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST g ON u.USER_ID = g.GROUP_ID and u.TENANT_ID = g.TENANT_ID and LOWER(u.USER_TYPE) = 'group' WHERE (u.FOLDER_ID = #folderId# OR (u.FOLDER_MANAGER = 1 AND u.FOLDER_ID = (SELECT REGEXP_SUBSTR(REGEXP_replace(folder_path, '^[|][0-9]+[|]', ''), '^[0-9]+') FROM tbl_webfolder_folder where FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#))) AND u.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY FOLDER_MANAGER DESC, USER_TYPE ASC, DISPLAY_NAME1 ASC

SELECT USER_ID, CASE WHEN LOWER(USER_TYPE) = "user" THEN a.DISPLAYNAME WHEN LOWER(USER_TYPE) = "dept" THEN d.DISPLAYNAME WHEN LOWER(USER_TYPE) = "jikwi" THEN jw.displayname WHEN LOWER(USER_TYPE) = "jikchek" THEN jc.displayname WHEN LOWER(USER_TYPE) = "group" THEN g.group_name else '' END AS DISPLAY_NAME1, CASE WHEN LOWER(USER_TYPE) = "user" THEN a.DISPLAYNAME2 WHEN LOWER(USER_TYPE) = "dept" THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 WHEN LOWER(USER_TYPE) = "jikwi" THEN jw.displayname2 WHEN LOWER(USER_TYPE) = "jikchek" THEN jc.displayname2 WHEN LOWER(USER_TYPE) = "group" THEN g.group_name else '' END AS DISPLAY_NAME2, USER_TYPE, SUBDEPT_PERMITTED, 0 AS FOLDER_MANAGER, CASE WHEN LOWER(USER_TYPE) = 'user' THEN a.DESCRIPTION END AS DISPLAY_DEPT_NAME1, CASE WHEN LOWER(USER_TYPE) = 'user' THEN a.DESCRIPTION2 END AS DISPLAY_DEPT_NAME2 FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILEUSER u LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER a ON u.USER_ID = a.CN and u.TENANT_ID = a.TENANT_ID and LOWER(u.USER_TYPE) = 'user' LEFT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER d ON u.USER_ID = d.CN and u.TENANT_ID = d.TENANT_ID and LOWER(u.USER_TYPE) = 'dept' LEFT JOIN TBL_USER_JOBMASTER jw ON u.USER_ID = jw.JOBID and u.TENANT_ID = jw.TENANT_ID and u.COMPANY_ID = jw.COMPANYID and LOWER(u.USER_TYPE) = 'jikwi' and jw.TYPE = '001' LEFT JOIN TBL_USER_JOBMASTER jc ON u.USER_ID = jc.JOBID and u.TENANT_ID = jc.TENANT_ID and u.COMPANY_ID = jc.COMPANYID and LOWER(u.USER_TYPE) = 'jikchek' and jc.TYPE = '002' LEFT JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST g ON u.USER_ID = g.GROUP_ID and u.TENANT_ID = g.TENANT_ID and LOWER(u.USER_TYPE) = 'group' WHERE u.FILE_ID = #fileId# AND u.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY USER_TYPE ASC, DISPLAY_NAME1 ASC

SELECT a.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, a.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME, a.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDER_NAME2,
CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER b WHERE b.FOLDER_UPPER = a.FOLDER_ID AND b.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND b.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS HAS_SUB,
CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER WHERE FOLDER_ID = a.FOLDER_ID AND USER_ID = #userId# AND FOLDER_MANAGER = 1) = 1 THEN CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER b WHERE b.FOLDER_UPPER = a.FOLDER_ID AND b.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND b.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ELSE CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER b WHERE b.FOLDER_UPPER = a.FOLDER_ID AND b.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND b.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND FOLDER_ID IN (SELECT FOLDER_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER WHERE USER_ID IN
#idList[]#
) ) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END END AS HAS_SUB,
a.FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDER_LEVEL FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER a WHERE
a.FOLDER_UPPER = #folderUpper#
AND a.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND a.OWNER_ID NOT IN ('shared_mailbox_Top')
AND ( REGEXP_SUBSTR(REGEXP_replace(folder_path, '^[|][0-9]+[|]', ''), '^[0-9]+') IN (SELECT FOLDER_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER WHERE USER_ID = #userId# AND FOLDER_MANAGER = 1 ) OR a.FOLDER_ID IN (SELECT FOLDER_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER WHERE USER_ID IN
#idList[]#
) )
ORDER BY a.FOLDER_NAME1, a.FOLDER_LEVEL ASC, a.FOLDER_STEP ASC

SELECT FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME1, FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDER_NAME2, FOLDER_TYPE AS FOLDER_TYPE, FOLDER_PATH AS FOLDER_PATH, FOLDER_STEP AS FOLDER_STEP, FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDER_LEVEL, FOLDER_UPPER AS FOLDER_UPPER, USE_STATUS AS USE_STATUS, OWNER_ID AS OWNER_ID, CREATE_ID AS CREATE_ID, DATE_ADD(CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2 AS CREATE_NAME2, UPDATE_ID AS UPDATE_ID, DATE_ADD(UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID AS COMPANY_ID, DELETER_ID AS DELETER_ID, TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_UPPER = #folderUpper# AND USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY FOLDER_NAME1, FOLDER_LEVEL ASC, FOLDER_STEP ASC
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE SET USE_STATUS = 'T', DELETER_ID = #userId#, UPDATE_DATE = #timeUTC# WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER SET USE_STATUS = 'T', DELETER_ID = #userId#, UPDATE_DATE = #timeUTC# WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER SET USE_STATUS = 'N', DELETER_ID = #userId#, UPDATE_DATE = #timeUTC# WHERE USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#folderPath#, '%') AND FOLDER_ID != #folderId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE f JOIN ( SELECT * FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#folderPath#, '%') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) AS d ON f.FOLDER_ID = d.FOLDER_ID AND f.TENANT_ID = d.TENANT_ID SET f.USE_STATUS = 'N', f.DELETER_ID = #userId#, f.UPDATE_DATE = #timeUTC# WHERE f.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND f.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE SET FILE_NAME = #name#, UPDATE_DATE = #timeUTC# WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE SET FOLDER_ID = #folderId#, DEPTH = 1, ROOT_ID = FILE_ID, PARENT_ID = FILE_ID, HIERARCHICAL_PATH = FILE_ID WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE SET FOLDER_ID = #folderId#, FILE_NAME = #newFileName#, DEPTH = 1, ROOT_ID = FILE_ID, PARENT_ID = FILE_ID, HIERARCHICAL_PATH = FILE_ID WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE SET DOWN_COUNT = DOWN_COUNT + 1 WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT c.CN AS DEPT_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN c.DISPLAYNAME ELSE c.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DEPT_NAME, c.level AS LEVEL, c.has_sub AS HAS_SUB FROM ( SELECT b.*, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER d WHERE b.CN = d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 AND b.TENANT_ID = d.TENANT_ID) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS HAS_SUB, #level# AS LEVEL FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER b WHERE b.CN = #companyId# AND b.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UNION
SELECT a.*, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER e WHERE a.CN = e.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 AND e.CN <> e.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AND a.TENANT_ID = e.TENANT_ID) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS HAS_SUB, (#level# + 1) AS LEVEL FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER a WHERE a.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #companyId# AND a.CN <> a.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) c ORDER BY LEVEL, lpad(ifnull(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0),6,0), DISPLAYNAME

SELECT a.CN AS DEPT_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN a.DISPLAYNAME ELSE a.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DEPT_NAME, #level# AS LEVEL, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER b WHERE a.CN = b.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 AND b.CN <> b.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AND a.TENANT_ID = b.TENANT_ID) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS HAS_SUB FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER a WHERE a.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #deptId# AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND a.CN <> a.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AND a.CN NOT LIKE '%trash_dept_%'
DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
ORDER BY lpad(ifnull(a.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0),6,0), a.DISPLAYNAME

SELECT a.CN AS DEPT_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN a.DISPLAYNAME ELSE a.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DEPT_NAME, #level# AS LEVEL, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER b WHERE a.CN = b.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 AND a.TENANT_ID = b.TENANT_ID) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS HAS_SUB FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER a WHERE a.CN = #deptId# AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT DEPT_CD_PATH FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #deptId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT AA.CN AS CN, AA.POSITION AS POSITION, AA.DISPLAYNAME AS DISPLAYNAME, AA.DEPARTMENT AS DEPARTMENT, AA.DEPARTMENTNAME AS DEPARTMENTNAME FROM ( SELECT CN AS CN, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END AS POSITION, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DEPARTMENT AS DEPARTMENT, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END AS DEPARTMENTNAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #deptId# AND CN != 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT A.CN AS CN, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN B.TITLE ELSE B.TITLE2 END AS POSITION, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN A.DISPLAYNAME ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, A.DEPARTMENT AS DEPARTMENT, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN A.DESCRIPTION ELSE A.DESCRIPTION2 END AS DEPARTMENTNAME FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #deptId# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
B.USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
) AA ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC

SELECT a.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, a.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME, a.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDER_NAME2, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER b WHERE b.FOLDER_UPPER = a.FOLDER_ID AND b.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND b.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS HAS_SUB, a.FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDER_LEVEL, a.OWNER_ID AS OWNER_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER a WHERE a.FOLDER_TYPE = 'D' AND a.FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' AND a.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND a.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND a.OWNER_ID NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE '%shared_mailbox%' OR DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE '%trash%') ORDER BY a.FOLDER_NAME1, a.FOLDER_LEVEL ASC, a.FOLDER_STEP ASC

SELECT cn, cn deptid, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN displayname ELSE displayname2 END displayname, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN displayname ELSE displayname2 END deptnm, displayname displayname1, displayname2, mail, extensionattribute1, extensionattribute2, extensionattribute3, extensionattribute4, extensionattribute5, extensionattribute6, extensionattribute7, extensionattribute8, extensionattribute9, extensionattribute10, extensionattribute11, extensionattribute12, extensionattribute13, extensionattribute14, extensionattribute15, adspath, updatedt, 'dept' type FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE extensionattribute2 = #companyId# AND useflag = 'Y' AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND cn NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE '%shared_mailbox%' OR DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE '%trash%')

SELECT distinct f.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, f.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME, f.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDER_NAME2, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER b WHERE b.FOLDER_UPPER = f.FOLDER_ID AND b.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND b.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS HAS_SUB, f.FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDER_LEVEL FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER f JOIN ( SELECT d.* FROM tbl_deptmaster d LEFT JOIN tbl_addjobmaster a ON d.CN = a.DEPTID AND d.TENANT_ID = a.TENANT_ID WHERE (a.CN = #userId# OR d.CN = #deptId#) AND d.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) AS s ON f.OWNER_ID = s.CN AND f.TENANT_ID = s.TENANT_ID AND f.FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' AND f.FOLDER_TYPE = 'D' AND f.OWNER_ID = s.CN WHERE f.FOLDER_TYPE = 'D' AND f.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND f.USE_STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY f.FOLDER_NAME1, f.FOLDER_LEVEL ASC, f.FOLDER_STEP ASC

SELECT f.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, f.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME, f.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDER_NAME2, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER b WHERE b.FOLDER_UPPER = f.FOLDER_ID AND b.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND b.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS HAS_SUB, f.FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDER_LEVEL FROM ( SELECT f1.* FROM tbl_webfolder_folder f1 JOIN ( SELECT d.* FROM tbl_deptmaster d LEFT JOIN tbl_addjobmaster a ON d.CN = a.DEPTID AND d.TENANT_ID = a.TENANT_ID WHERE (a.CN = #userId# OR d.CN = #deptId#) AND d.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) AS s ON f1.OWNER_ID = s.CN AND f1.TENANT_ID = s.TENANT_ID AND f1.FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' AND f1.FOLDER_TYPE = 'D' AND f1.OWNER_ID = s.CN WHERE f1.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UNION
SELECT f2.* FROM tbl_webfolder_folder f2 JOIN tbl_webfolder_folderuser u ON f2.FOLDER_ID = u.FOLDER_ID AND u.USER_ID = #userId# AND u.USER_TYPE = 'chief' AND f2.TENANT_ID = u.TENANT_ID JOIN ( SELECT d1.* FROM tbl_deptmaster d1 JOIN ( SELECT * FROM tbl_deptmaster WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) AS d2 ON d1.DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE CONCAT(d2.DEPT_CD_PATH, '%') ) AS s1 ON s1.CN = f2.OWNER_ID AND s1.TENANT_ID = f2.TENANT_ID WHERE f2.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) AS f WHERE f.FOLDER_TYPE = 'D' AND f.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND f.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND f.FOLDER_LEVEL = 0 ORDER BY f.FOLDER_NAME1, f.FOLDER_LEVEL ASC, f.FOLDER_STEP ASC

SELECT f.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, f.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME, f.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDER_NAME2,
CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER b WHERE b.FOLDER_UPPER = f.FOLDER_ID AND b.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND b.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS HAS_SUB,
CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER WHERE FOLDER_ID = f.FOLDER_ID AND USER_ID = #userId# AND FOLDER_MANAGER = 1) = 1 THEN CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER b WHERE b.FOLDER_UPPER = f.FOLDER_ID AND b.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND b.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ELSE CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER b WHERE b.FOLDER_UPPER = f.FOLDER_ID AND b.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND b.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND FOLDER_ID IN (SELECT FOLDER_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER WHERE USER_ID IN
#idList[]#
) ) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END END AS HAS_SUB,
f.FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDER_LEVEL FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER f
WHERE f.FOLDER_TYPE = 'C' AND f.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND f.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND f.FOLDER_UPPER = #compFolderId#
AND f.FOLDER_ID IN (SELECT FOLDER_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER WHERE USER_ID IN
#idList[]#
)
ORDER BY f.FOLDER_NAME1, f.FOLDER_LEVEL ASC, f.FOLDER_STEP ASC

SELECT f.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, f.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME, f.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDER_NAME2, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER b WHERE b.FOLDER_UPPER = f.FOLDER_ID AND b.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND b.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS HAS_SUB, f.FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDER_LEVEL FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT f1.* FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER f1 JOIN ( SELECT u.* FROM tbl_webfolder_folderuser u LEFT JOIN ( SELECT d1.* FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER d1 LEFT JOIN tbl_addjobmaster a ON d1.CN = a.DEPTID AND d1.TENANT_ID = a.TENANT_ID WHERE (a.CN = #userId# OR d1.CN = #deptId#) AND d1.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# UNION SELECT d2.* FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER d2 JOIN ( SELECT f.* FROM ( tbl_webfolder_folder f JOIN tbl_webfolder_folderuser u ON f.FOLDER_ID = u.FOLDER_ID AND u.USER_ID = #userId# AND u.USER_TYPE = 'chief' AND f.TENANT_ID = u.TENANT_ID JOIN ( SELECT d3.* FROM tbl_deptmaster d3 JOIN ( SELECT * FROM tbl_deptmaster WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) AS d4 ON d3.DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE CONCAT(d4.DEPT_CD_PATH, '%') ) AS s1 ON s1.CN = f.OWNER_ID AND s1.TENANT_ID = f.TENANT_ID ) ) AS a ON d2.CN = a.OWNER_ID AND a.FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' AND d2.TENANT_ID = a.TENANT_ID WHERE d2.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) AS s ON u.USER_ID = s.CN AND u.USER_TYPE = 'dept' AND u.TENANT_ID = s.TENANT_ID WHERE u.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ((u.USER_ID = #userId# AND u.USER_TYPE = 'user') OR (u.USER_ID = s.CN AND u.USER_TYPE = 'dept') OR (u.USER_ID = #compId# AND u.USER_TYPE = 'dept')) ) AS s ON f1.TENANT_ID = s.TENANT_ID AND f1.FOLDER_ID = s.FOLDER_ID WHERE f1.FOLDER_TYPE = 'C' AND f1.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND f1.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND f1.FOLDER_UPPER = #compFolderId#
) f ORDER BY f.FOLDER_NAME1, f.FOLDER_LEVEL ASC, f.FOLDER_STEP ASC

SELECT a.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, a.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME, a.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDER_NAME2, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER b WHERE b.FOLDER_UPPER = a.FOLDER_ID AND b.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND b.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS HAS_SUB, a.FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDER_LEVEL FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER a WHERE a.FOLDER_TYPE = 'C' AND a.FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' AND a.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND a.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY a.FOLDER_NAME1, a.FOLDER_LEVEL ASC, a.FOLDER_STEP ASC

SELECT f.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, f.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME, f.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDER_NAME2, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER b WHERE b.FOLDER_UPPER = f.FOLDER_ID AND b.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND b.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS HAS_SUB, f.FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDER_LEVEL FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER f WHERE f.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND f.FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' AND f.FOLDER_TYPE = 'U' AND f.OWNER_ID = #userId# AND f.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
SELECT * FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_ENV WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT CN, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_ENV WHERE CN = #userId# AND ENV_TYPE = 'P' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_ENV SET ENV_VALUE = #listCount# WHERE CN = #userId# AND ENV_TYPE = 'P' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

sqlMap.select: SELECT s.CN AS DEPT_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN s.DISPLAYNAME ELSE s.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DEPT_NAME, #level# AS LEVEL, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER b WHERE s.CN = b.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 AND s.TENANT_ID = b.TENANT_ID) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS HAS_SUB FROM tbl_deptmaster s WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY LEVEL, lpad(ifnull(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0),6,0), DISPLAYNAME

SELECT s.CN AS DEPT_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN s.DISPLAYNAME ELSE s.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DEPT_NAME, #level# AS LEVEL, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER b WHERE s.CN = b.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 AND s.TENANT_ID = b.TENANT_ID) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS HAS_SUB FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER s JOIN ( SELECT * FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) AS d1 ON s.DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE CONCAT(d1.DEPT_CD_PATH, '%') JOIN ( SELECT d2.* FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER d2 JOIN ( SELECT f.* FROM ( tbl_webfolder_folder f JOIN tbl_webfolder_folderuser u ON f.FOLDER_ID = u.FOLDER_ID AND u.USER_ID = #userId# AND u.USER_TYPE = 'chief' AND f.TENANT_ID = u.TENANT_ID ) ) AS a ON d2.CN = a.OWNER_ID AND a.FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' AND d2.TENANT_ID = a.TENANT_ID ) AS s2 ON s.CN = s2.CN and s.TENANT_ID = s2.TENANT_ID WHERE s.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY LEVEL, lpad(ifnull(s.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0),6,0), s.DISPLAYNAME
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE WHERE FILE_ID IN ($fileList$) AND CREATE_ID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(FILE_SIZE), 0) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE WHERE FILE_ID IN ($fileList$) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN FOLDER_NAME1 ELSE FOLDER_NAME2 END AS FOLDER_NAME FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_ID IN
#path[]#
AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY FOLDER_LEVEL ASC

SELECT FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN FOLDER_NAME1 ELSE FOLDER_NAME2 END AS FOLDER_NAME FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_ID IN
#testbnk[]#
AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT DISTINCT F1.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER F1 JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE F2 ON F2.FILE_ID IN
#fileIds[]#
AND F1.FOLDER_ID = F2.FOLDER_ID AND F1.TENANT_ID = F2.TENANT_ID WHERE F1.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME, FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDER_NAME2, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER A WHERE A.FOLDER_UPPER = D.FOLDER_ID AND A.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS HAS_SUB, FOLDER_LEVEL, OWNER_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER D JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT S.FOLDERFILE_ID, S.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE S JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_SUB SS ON S.SHARE_ID = SS.SHARE_ID AND S.TENANT_ID = SS.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_SHARE_HIDE SH ON S.SHARE_ID = SH.SHARE_ID AND S.TENANT_ID = SH.TENANT_ID AND SH.USER_ID = #userId# WHERE SS.USER_ID IN
#idList[].id#
AND S. FOLDERFILE_TYPE = 'D' AND SH.USER_ID IS NULL ) SD ON D.FOLDER_ID = SD.FOLDERFILE_ID AND D.TENANT_ID = SD.TENANT_ID WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND D.COMPANY_ID = #compId# AND D.USE_STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY FOLDER_NAME1
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_webfolder_file SET TYPE_ID = (select type_id from tbl_webfolder_filetype where FILE_EXT = #fileExt# and TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) , FILE_EXT = #realFileExt# , file_path = #filePath# , UPDATE_DATE = #timeUTC# WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# and TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_ENC_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

DELETE WF FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_ENC_FOLDER WF JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER F WHERE WF.FOLDER_ID <> #folderId# AND WF.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND F.FOLDER_ID = WF.FOLDER_ID AND F.TENANT_ID = WF.TENANT_ID AND F.FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#folderPath#, '%')
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_ENCRYPTED_FILE SELECT FILE_ID, VERSION, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE A FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE A LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_ENCRYPTED_FILE B ON A.FILE_ID = B.FILE_ID AND A.VERSION = B.VERSION AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.FILE_ID = #fileId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_ENCRYPTED_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_ENCRYPTED_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND VERSION = #version# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT F.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, F.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME1, F.FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDER_NAME2, F.FOLDER_TYPE AS FOLDER_TYPE, F.FOLDER_PATH AS FOLDER_PATH, F.FOLDER_STEP AS FOLDER_STEP, F.FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDER_LEVEL, F.FOLDER_UPPER AS FOLDER_UPPER, F.USE_STATUS AS USE_STATUS, F.OWNER_ID AS OWNER_ID, F.CREATE_ID AS CREATE_ID, DATE_ADD(F.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, F.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, F.CREATE_NAME2 AS CREATE_NAME2, F.UPDATE_ID AS UPDATE_ID, DATE_ADD(F.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATE_DATE, F.COMPANY_ID AS COMPANY_ID, F.DELETER_ID AS DELETER_ID, F.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER F RIGHT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_ENC_FOLDER WF ON F.FOLDER_ID = WF.FOLDER_ID AND F.TENANT_ID = WF.TENANT_ID WHERE #folderPath# LIKE CONCAT(F.FOLDER_PATH, '%') AND F.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY F.FOLDER_ID ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(F.FOLDER_ID) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER F RIGHT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_ENC_FOLDER WF ON F.FOLDER_ID = WF.FOLDER_ID AND F.TENANT_ID = WF.TENANT_ID WHERE #folderPath# LIKE CONCAT(F.FOLDER_PATH, '%') AND F.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT COUNT(B.FILE_ID) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE A RIGHT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_ENCRYPTED_FILE B ON A.FILE_ID = B.FILE_ID AND A.VERSION = B.VERSION AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.FILE_ID = #fileId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT COUNT(FILE_ID) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_ENCRYPTED_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND VERSION = #version# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT COUNT(ENC.FILE_ID) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE_HISTORY HIS RIGHT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_ENCRYPTED_FILE ENC ON ENC.FILE_ID = HIS.FILE_ID AND ENC.VERSION = HIS.VERSION AND ENC.TENANT_ID = HIS.TENANT_ID WHERE HIS.FILE_PATH = #filePath#
AND USE_STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY VERSION DESC
AND VERSION = #version#
ORDER BY VERSION DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT VERSION FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE_HISTORY (FILE_ID, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, USE_STATUS, UPDATE_DATE, DELETER_ID, TENANT_ID, UPDATE_ID, UPDATE_NAME, UPDATE_NAME2, VERSION, FILE_NAME) SELECT F.FILE_ID, F.FILE_PATH, F.FILE_SIZE, F.USE_STATUS, F.UPDATE_DATE, NULL, F.TENANT_ID, U.CN, U.DISPLAYNAME, U.DISPLAYNAME2, #version#, F.FILE_NAME FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE F LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON F.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID AND U.CN = #modifierUserId# WHERE F.FILE_ID = #fileId# AND F.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE SET VERSION = #version# WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE_HISTORY SET FILE_PATH = #filePath# WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND VERSION = #version# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE_HISTORY SET USE_STATUS = 'T', DELETER_ID = #deleteUserId# WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND VERSION = #version# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE_HISTORY SET USE_STATUS = 'Y', DELETER_ID = NULL WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND VERSION = #version# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT DISTINCT (cn), mail, DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER a JOIN ( (SELECT P.MEMBER_ID AS USER_ID, P.MEMBER_TYPE AS USER_TYPE FROM TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPINFO P JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER W2 ON P.GROUP_ID = W2.USER_ID WHERE W2.USER_TYPE = 'GROUP' AND W2.FOLDER_ID = #folderId#) UNION (SELECT USER_ID, USER_TYPE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER W WHERE W.USER_TYPE NOT IN ('DEPT', 'GROUP') AND W.FOLDER_ID = #folderId#) ) b ON a.cn = b.user_id OR a.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 = b.USER_ID OR a.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 = b.USER_ID
SELECT COUNT(FILE_ID) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE WHERE PARENT_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND FILE_ID <> PARENT_ID AND USE_STATUS = 'Y'

select.isPropertyAvailable: SELECT DISTINCT PARENT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND DEPTH > 1 AND USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT DISTINCT PARENT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE WHERE PARENT_ID IN
#fileIds[]#
AND DEPTH > 1 AND USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(FILE_ID) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILEUSER WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND USER_ID = #userId#
SELECT COUNT(FOLDER_ID) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND USER_ID = #userId# AND FOLDER_MANAGER = #manager#
SELECT FOLDER_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_NO_INHERIT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT COUNT(F.FOLDER_ID) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_NO_INHERIT NI INNER JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER F ON F.FOLDER_ID = NI.FOLDER_ID AND F.TENANT_ID = NI.TENANT_ID WHERE #folderPath# LIKE F.FOLDER_PATH || '%' AND NI.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_NO_INHERIT WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
